Disclaimer

Disclaimer

Herbal Tea Bag Guide publishes general information, cultural context, tools, product research, and paid report options. The content is not professional advice.

General information only

Articles, calculators, readings, checklists, reports, and product notes are for education, planning, and personal reflection. They should not be treated as medical, legal, financial, psychological, safety, or other professional advice.

No guaranteed outcomes

Cultural meanings, symbolic interpretations, number readings, dream explanations, wedding customs, tea suggestions, and I Ching reflections vary by person, family, region, tradition, and situation. We do not guarantee a prediction, result, purchase outcome, health effect, relationship outcome, or business result.

Advertising, affiliate links, and paid reports

This site may include ads, affiliate links, product notes, digital reports, or checkout options. Visitors should verify prices, product details, policies, delivery terms, and suitability before making a purchase.

User responsibility

Use the content as a structured starting point. For important decisions involving health, money, law, safety, relationships, or personal risk, consult a qualified professional or trusted source before acting.

Contact

For questions about this disclaimer, contact guan@shanyuegroup.com.
